canonical_text:
L2_BIBLE_GENESIS_001-S01: Isaac his son; and he took the fire in his hand, and a knife; and they went both of them together.
L2_BIBLE_GENESIS_001-S02: 22:7 And Isaac spake unto Abraham his father, and said, My father: and he said, Here am I, my son. And he said, Behold the fire and the wood: but where is the lamb for a burnt offering? 22:8 And Abraham said, My son, God will provide himself a lamb for a burnt offering: so they went both of them together.
